rules.rule: every section MUST cite section_id, manual_id, section_kind ∈ SECTION_KINDS, reviewer, and lineage references (extraction_ids, grounding_ids, evidence_refs).
section_kind MUST be one of: semantic-section, semantic-procedure, semantic-warning-group, semantic-specification-group, semantic-troubleshooting-group, semantic-support-group.
sections MUST preserve unresolved_states (list) and trust_composition counts {reviewer-approved, review-required, unresolved}.
orphan sections (citing extraction_ids or grounding_ids that do not resolve) BLOCK approval (fail-closed PI-3).
duplicate section_id within a manual_id is FORBIDDEN (fail-closed PI-4).
sections MUST NOT contain CSS, breakpoints, layout instructions, typography, or rendering hints.
sections are append-only; in-place mutation is FORBIDDEN.
semantic-procedure sections MUST cite contiguous step_index sequences starting at 1; gaps are fail-closed (PC-2).
